assertions.title: Export org chart as PDF and PNG

steps.expected: Format options for PDF/PNG and export action are available
steps.observed: Modal showed PNG/PDF options and Export button

steps.expected: PDF downloads with meaningful default name
PNG downloads with meaningful default name and readable chart
steps.observed: Downloaded PNG named org-planner-OrgMgmt-Export-G3-Baseline-2026-04-17.png with readable chart cards/edges

evidence.network: Client-side export flow; no export API request captured

assertions.title: Export respects current filter and overlay state

steps.observed: Org chart showed only active employees (Alice, Bob)
Exported PNG contains only active employees and excludes planned employee

evidence.network: Client-side export flow; no export API request captured

assertions.title: Set future effective date on organizational changes

steps.action: Open Bob employee details and schedule future title change for 2026-04-18
steps.observed: Scheduled change created; Scheduled Changes badge incremented to 1

steps.expected: Title remains current until effective date
steps.observed: Title stayed as Software Engineer immediately after scheduling
Panel listed pending promotion entry for Bob with effective date

assertions.title: Visual indicator for pending effective-dated changes

steps.expected: Pending indicator visible on affected employee card
steps.observed: Bob card showed Pending badge on Org Chart

steps.expected: Pending indicator visible on corresponding row
steps.observed: Bob row showed pending marker in Hierarchy
Scheduled Changes panel displayed change type/date/title details

evidence.network: No additional request required during indicator verification

steps.action: Edit pending change effective date to current date (simulation)
steps.expected: Change should apply when date arrives
steps.observed: After save + reload, pending badge disappeared
Bob title updated to Senior Software Engineer in Org Chart and Hierarchy

evidence.network: Date-arrival simulation performed via UI edit + reload; agent-browser network log was not reliable for this step

assertions.title: Cancel a scheduled change before effective date

steps.action: Schedule new future title change for 2026-04-20
steps.observed: Employee details showed 1 pending scheduled change

steps.action: Cancel pending change from Scheduled Changes panel
steps.observed: Pending list cleared and entry moved to history as canceled
Bob remained Senior Software Engineer (not Principal), no pending indicator

evidence.network: POST /api/scenarios/69e1c7d6b49b42801d0be417/scheduled-changes -> 201; DELETE /api/scheduled-changes/69e1c9c5b49b42801d0be692 -> 200 (captured via in-page XHR logging)

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests output was intermittently empty during UI flows
frictions.resolution: Used temporary in-page XHR/fetch logging (window.__netLog) to capture request/status evidence when needed

frictions.description: Export format radio inputs were intermittently blocked by overlay icon hitboxes
frictions.resolution: Used cursor-interactive container targets plus agent-browser download command to complete deterministic PDF/PNG exports

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-ORG-010..015): 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Export flows produced PDF/PNG artifacts, filtered export matched active-only state, future-dated scheduling behaved correctly with pending indicators, simulated effective-date auto-apply updated title across views, and cancel-before-effective-date prevented application.
